text.title: Agent Observability Stack Blueprint Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when agent-observability-stack-blueprint is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Bill triples after a viral launch; no idea which feature spent it.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r2: tag every call; build a USD-by-feature dashboard in week 1.

antipattern.description: Quality drop noticed by a customer first.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r3: 1% sampling minimum; alert on r4 threshold.

antipattern.description: Stack adopts LangSmith for a stack that has no LangChain anywhere.
antipattern.reason: Vendor pick mismatched to stack reality.
